title: valeriana sambucifolia subsp. amurensis
intro: Valeriana sambucifolia subsp. amurensis, also known as Amur valerian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the valerian family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-anxiety effects, as well as its ability to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality. The health benefits of Amur valerian include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as its potential to reduce symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Amur valerian can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote a restful night's sleep and alleviate stress-related disorders.
